site.title: Riwruok mar International Accessibility Task Force
site.tagline: Ne dwarore ni ji duto oyud thuolo mar ng'iewo gik moko
nav.label: Puonj Moting'o Puonj
skip.toContent: Dhi e weche man e iye
hero.home.eyebrow: Yore ma ji nyalo yudogo weche e Intanet
meta.home.description: IATF loko dwaro ma ji nigo mar yudo buge e dhok ma ji duto nyalo winjo mondo okonygi ng'eyo dhokgo.
meta.projects.description: Ng'i chenro mag konyo ji yudo buge mogo gi riwruok mar IATF.
meta.propose.description: Kwa IATF mondo okonyi gi chenro mar bedo ng'ama yot wuoyogo kitiyo gi intanet, e-mail, kata Discord.
meta.governance.description: Som kaka riwruok mar IATF yie gi chenro mag timo nonro, rito kuonde ma gik moko nitie, kendo keto tijego e lela.
meta.join.description: Yore ma ng'ato nyalo konyorego e IATF: chiwo kode, loko, temo, kata rito chenro moro.
meta.accessibility.description: Kaka IATF dwaro ni websaitni osiki ka yudore kendo kaka ng'ato nyalo chiwo ripot ka nitie gima geng'e yudo websaitno.
meta.transparency.description: Buge mag IATF ma yudore e lela: buche, chenro, kod weche manyien mitimo pile pile.
registry.empty.title: Onge chenro moro amora ma osendik nyaka sani
registry.empty.body: IATF chano chenro mokwongo mar timo tijno e lela.
proposal.form.title: Or ne ng'ato wach moro.
proposal.form.body: Pong' fom man piny kae mondo ior kwayo ne IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript dwarore mondo iti gi fomni mar web. Ka ok oyudore, ti gi e-mail kata Discord kar mano.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Chiwo mar ngima ok ochan e alwora ma kama. fomni biro yawo email client mari kar mano.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Ikruok mar chiwo weche e yo makare...
proposal.form.ready: Sama ioro kwayo, IATF biro loso rekod mar kwayo.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Tim nonro mar geng'o spam kapok ioro.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Chenro mar geng'o barupe ma ok dwarre oserumo. Ka diher, tim nonro kendo kapok ioro barupe.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Geng'o spam ok nyal fwenyore gie sani. Tem kendo.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Kinde mar geng'o spam oserumo. Tem nono kendo.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Tim ber i pong kabedo ma mitte ma peya icwalo.
proposal.form.success: Erokamano. Kwayoni oserwak kendo okan mondo ong'i.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Kapo ni ibiro tudori gi IATF kendo e wi kwayo ma kamano, ne ni itiyo gi adres man piny kae.
proposal.form.successRecordLabel: Weche ma ne okor e wi chiemo ma ne ichamo
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Gimoro ne odhi marach sama ne ioro kwayo. Tem kendo. Ka chandruok odhi nyime, ti gi e-mail kar mano.
proposal.field.conditional: En gi gik moko madwarore ni otim
project.detail.eyebrow: Chenro ma ji duto nyalo donjogo
project.detail.problemTitle: En chandruok mane ma chenrono biro tieko?
project.detail.scopeOutTitle: Ok ochuno ni mano e kaka onego otimre.
project.detail.field.languageNotes: Weche Mwanyalo Tiyogo e Dhok Mopogore Opogore
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Dhok ma ne okwong ndikgo Muma e dho - Ingresa mayot, to ne inyalo loke bang'e
footer.label: Weche manie chak sulani
footer.licenseContent: Weche man e iye CC BY-SA 4.0
footer.blurb: Tije ma konyo ji ng'eyo tiend weche manie Muma onego obed mayot chako, mayot goyo, kendo mayot rito.
footer.source: Tiyo gi chike mag konyo ji ng'e dhokno: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Tiyo gi gik ma josomo ma tiyo gi teknoloji makonyo osefwenyo.
contact.label: Tudruok
project.status.seeking-maintainer: Dwaro ng'at ma biro rito tijno
translation.label: Kaka Muma Iloko e Dhok Mopogore Opogore
translation.source: Dhok mar Kisungu e ma itiyogo ahinya e weche ma yudore e websaitwa.
translation.humanReviewed: Ng'at mong'eyo wuoyo e yo molony ema osenono loko mar Mumani.
translation.machineAssisted: Lokoni en loko mar masin kendo pok ong'ere malong'o gi ng'at ma olony e dhokno.
translation.needsUpdate: Loko mar Mumani ne oloki kane pok oloki gocho mar dho Kisungu mogik, kendo nyalo dwarore ni otimne lokruok.
translation.report: Lando wach mar loko: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Mano ok nyal timore.
